concept: Co-op city-heist strategy RPG with systemic factions

mechanics.core_loop: Scout district, plan crew loadout, execute heist, launder gains into upgrades
mechanics.simulation_depth_notes: District economies react to player raids and faction unrest over time.

narrative.premise: A fractured megacity where rival factions exploit black-market infrastructure.
narrative.player_fantasy: Mastermind who outsmarts stronger powers through planning and adaptation.
narrative.tone: Grounded, tense, and occasionally darkly humorous.
narrative.world_notes: Three dominant factions control transit, data, and biotech corridors.

style.art_direction: Rainy high-contrast urban palette with readable silhouettes.
style.camera_direction: Hybrid tactical isometric with contextual closeups.
style.ui_direction: Dense tactical HUD with progressive disclosure for advanced tools.
style.audio_direction: Industrial percussion mixed with low-fi synth tension beds.

uncertainty_decisions.source_input: I am not sure which focus is best

options.title: Systems-first strategy
options.summary: Prioritize simulation and tactical planning depth.
options.tradeoff: Narrative arcs mature later in production.

options.title: Narrative-first RPG
options.summary: Center character drama and branching dialogue.

options.title: Balanced hybrid
options.summary: Blend strategic systems with authored story beats.

options.title: Shadow Courier
options.summary: Smuggle volatile biotech between hostile districts.
options.tradeoff: Requires careful stealth readability at speed.

options.title: Rail Saboteur
options.summary: Hijack transit chokepoints to control faction logistics.
options.tradeoff: Complex mission scripting and replay balancing.

options.title: Ledger Ghost
options.summary: Manipulate data ledgers to bankrupt rival syndicates.
options.tradeoff: Abstract systems need strong UX scaffolding.

options.title: Pause-and-plan
options.summary: Queue tactical actions with slow-time review windows.
options.tradeoff: Can feel less immediate for action players.

options.title: Real-time squad commands
options.summary: Direct multiple operatives live with formation shortcuts.
options.tradeoff: Higher onboarding burden for new players.

options.title: Turn-based encounters
options.summary: Discrete tactical turns with clear information pacing.

uncertainty_decisions.source_input: I don't know how much tutorialization we need

options.title: Guided campaign onboarding
options.summary: Author explicit tutorials over first three missions.
options.tradeoff: More up-front design and scripting cost.

options.title: Contextual coaching
options.summary: Surface hints only when players stall or fail patterns.
options.tradeoff: Needs robust telemetry and trigger tuning.

options.title: Sandbox-first briefing
options.summary: Let players experiment with optional objective prompts.
options.tradeoff: Risk of early confusion for some audiences.
